metadata.description: Curated reference disease concepts (kind=disease) with ICD-10 codes. Top causes of morbidity/mortality plus vaccine-target diseases. Patient disease instances live as ClinicalEvent -> FHIR Condition referencing these concepts.

items.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
items.description: Chronic metabolic disorder characterized by insulin resistance and relative insulin deficiency.

items.name: Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus
items.description: Autoimmune destruction of pancreatic beta cells leading to absolute insulin deficiency.

items.name: Essential Hypertension
items.description: Persistently elevated arterial blood pressure with no identifiable cause.

items.name: Hypercholesterolemia, Unspecified
items.description: Elevated blood cholesterol levels, a major modifiable risk factor for cardiovascular disease.

items.name: Atherosclerotic Heart Disease
items.description: Narrowing of the coronary arteries due to atherosclerosis, causing reduced blood flow to the heart.

items.name: Heart Failure, Unspecified
items.description: Inability of the heart to pump sufficient blood to meet the body's metabolic needs.

items.name: Atrial Fibrillation
items.description: Common supraventricular arrhythmia characterized by disorganized atrial electrical activity.

items.name: Cerebral Infarction, Unspecified
items.description: Sudden neurological deficit caused by interruption of blood supply to the brain.

items.name: Phlebitis and Thrombophlebitis of Deep Vessels of Lower Extremities
items.description: Blood clot formation in the deep veins, typically of the lower extremities.

items.name: Pulmonary Embolism without Acute Cor Pulmonale
items.description: Blockage of a pulmonary artery, usually by a clot that has traveled from a deep vein.

items.name: Asthma, Unspecified
items.description: Chronic inflammatory airway disease characterized by reversible bronchoconstriction.

items.name: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease, Unspecified
items.description: Progressive airflow limitation not fully reversible, usually related to smoking.

items.name: Pneumonia, Unspecified Organism
items.description: Infection and inflammation of the lung parenchyma causing consolidation.

items.name: Pneumonia due to Streptococcus pneumoniae
items.description: Bacterial pneumonia caused by Streptococcus pneumoniae; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Influenza due to unidentified influenza virus
items.description: Acute viral respiratory infection caused by influenza viruses; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: COVID-19
items.description: Acute respiratory illness caused by SARS-CoV-2; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Hypothyroidism, Unspecified
items.description: Insufficient thyroid hormone production leading to slowed metabolism.

items.name: Thyrotoxicosis, Unspecified
items.description: Excess thyroid hormone production causing accelerated metabolism.

items.name: Chronic Kidney Disease, Unspecified
items.description: Progressive loss of kidney function over months to years.

items.name: Acute Kidney Failure, Unspecified
items.description: Abrupt loss of kidney function over hours to days, often reversible.

items.name: Gastro-Esophageal Reflux Disease without Esophagitis
items.description: Recurrent reflux of stomach contents into the esophagus causing symptoms.

items.name: Peptic Ulcer, Site Unspecified
items.description: Mucosal break in the stomach or duodenum, often caused by H. pylori or NSAIDs.

items.name: Crohn's Disease, Unspecified
items.description: Chronic transmural inflammatory bowel disease that can affect any part of the GI tract.

items.name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome without Diarrhea
items.description: Functional GI disorder with abdominal pain and altered bowel habits, no structural lesion.

items.name: Unspecified Viral Hepatitis B
items.description: Viral hepatitis caused by hepatitis B virus; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Unspecified Viral Hepatitis C
items.description: Viral hepatitis caused by hepatitis C virus; a leading cause of chronic liver disease.

items.name: Unspecified Cirrhosis of Liver
items.description: Diffuse fibrosis of the liver with regenerative nodules, the end stage of chronic liver disease.

items.name: Acute Pancreatitis, Unspecified
items.description: Acute inflammation of the pancreas, often caused by gallstones or alcohol.

items.name: Iron Deficiency Anemia, Unspecified
items.description: Decreased red blood cell production due to insufficient iron stores.

items.name: Epilepsy, Unspecified
items.description: Neurological disorder characterized by recurrent unprovoked seizures.

items.name: Migraine, Unspecified, Intractable, without Status Migrainosus
items.description: Recurrent primary headache disorder with sensory sensitivity and nausea.

items.name: Alzheimer's Disease, Unspecified
items.description: Progressive neurodegenerative dementia marked by amyloid plaques and tau tangles.

items.name: Parkinson's Disease
items.description: Neurodegenerative movement disorder with dopamine depletion and Lewy bodies.

items.name: Major Depressive Disorder, Recurrent
items.description: Persistent low mood and loss of interest impairing daily functioning.

items.name: Anxiety State, Unspecified
items.description: Excessive, persistent worry and physiological arousal not tied to a specific trigger.

items.name: Bipolar Disorder, Unspecified
items.description: Mood disorder with episodes of mania/hypomania alternating with depression.

items.name: Osteoporosis without Current Pathological Fracture
items.description: Systemic skeletal disease with low bone mass and microarchitectural deterioration.

items.name: Osteoarthritis, Unspecified
items.description: Degenerative joint disease with cartilage breakdown and bony overgrowth.

items.name: Rheumatoid Arthritis, Unspecified
items.description: Autoimmune symmetric inflammatory polyarthritis causing joint destruction.

items.name: Gout, Unspecified
items.description: Crystal-induced arthritis from monosodium urate deposition in joints.

items.name: Psoriasis, Unspecified
items.description: Chronic autoimmune skin disorder causing erythematous scaly plaques.

items.name: Atopic Neurodermatitis, Unspecified
items.description: Chronic inflammatory skin disease with pruritus and a relapsing course.

items.name: Low Back Pain, Unspecified
items.description: Pain in the lumbar region lasting beyond the expected healing period.

items.name: Morbid Obesity due to Excess Calories
items.description: Excess body fat accumulation to a degree that impairs health (BMI >= 40).

items.name: Metabolic Syndrome
items.description: Cluster of abdominal obesity, dyslipidemia, hypertension, and insulin resistance.

items.name: Malignant Neoplasm of Breast, Female, Unspecified
items.description: Malignant tumor arising from breast tissue, the most common cancer in women.

items.name: Malignant Neoplasm of Colon, Unspecified
items.description: Malignant tumor of the colon or rectum, often screened for via colonoscopy.

items.name: Malignant Neoplasm of Bronchus and Lung, Unspecified
items.description: Malignant tumor of the lung, strongly associated with smoking.

items.name: Malignant Neoplasm of Prostate
items.description: Malignant tumor of the prostate gland, a common cancer in older men.

items.name: Malignant Neoplasm of Cervix Uteri, Unspecified
items.description: Malignant tumor of the cervix, largely caused by persistent HPV infection; vaccine-preventable via HPV vaccination.

items.name: Human Papillomavirus Infection
items.description: Viral infection; high-risk types cause cervical and other cancers; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Measles, Unspecified
items.description: Highly contagious viral exanthem; vaccine-preventable via MMR.

items.name: Mumps, Unspecified
items.description: Viral infection of the salivary glands; vaccine-preventable via MMR.

items.name: Rubella, Unspecified
items.description: Viral exanthem; particularly dangerous in pregnancy; vaccine-preventable via MMR.

items.name: Tetanus, Unspecified
items.description: Neurotoxic illness from Clostridium tetani toxin; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Diphtheria, Unspecified
items.description: Acute bacterial pharyngitis with pseudomembrane formation; vaccine-preventable.

items.name: Whooping Cough due to Bordetella pertussis without Pneumonia
items.description: Highly contagious bacterial respiratory illness; vaccine-preventable.
